pipeline_mode__provenance.reason: No CLI override; default adaptive mode appropriate for v10.2.0 refactor scope.

enabled__provenance.reason: Composite complexity = 3 (>= 3 threshold per JIT Recommendation rule). 37-file rewrite + 3 new test scenarios benefits from per-phase context injection.

max_cycles__provenance.reason: Ambiguity score = 2 (moderate but bounded; B1/B2/B3 design choice is the only open question). Default 1 cycle sufficient; no high-ambiguity expansion warranted.

divergence_threshold__provenance.reason: Risk score = 3 (refactor with silent-degradation failure mode, but mitigated by Phase A guard + Phase C scenario). Default threshold sufficient.

enabled__provenance.reason: Composite complexity = 3 fails fast-track precondition (must be <= 2). Confidence = 0.85 fails fast-track precondition (must be >= 0.9). Pipeline runs full Phases 1-9.

auto_select_template__provenance.reason: No project template registry; section skipped per protocol.

dimension_weights__provenance.reason: Tilt toward correctness (+0.05 from default 0.30) because Phase B is mechanical rewrite across 37 files / ~175-201 occurrences -- a single missed reference returns the silent-degradation bug v10.2.0 is designed to fix. Security reduced symmetrically (-0.05 from default 0.30) because v10.2.0 is internal text refactor with no credential/network/data path. spec_alignment + robustness held at default. Weights sum to 1.0.

skip_phases__provenance.reason: task_type = refactor (implementation type); action = full_pipeline per routing-decision.json. No phase skip recommended. All 9 phases active.

active_phases__provenance.reason: Refactor with composite complexity 3 + cross-file scope warrants full pipeline.

agents__provenance.reason: Composite complexity = 3 -> default agent scaling. Phase 1-2 research = 3 parallel angles. Phase 3 brainstorm = 3 personas (conservative/innovative/skeptical). Phase 8 verification = 4 adversarial dimensions.

models__provenance.reason: Composite complexity 3 = default tier (no upgrade or downgrade). Spec + plan use opus (design-critical). Research + brainstorm + tdd + execute + verify use sonnet (mechanical / analytical). Completion uses haiku (template-driven release notes + roadmap diff).
